pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh where it creates the project directory.
Counted exactly 12 test functions defined in tests/test_availability.py and tests/test_timezones.py in setup_task.sh. There is no parameterization.

privileged_info_summary: The project directory is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/meeting_scheduler. The agent must achieve a score of at least 90 to pass according to the verifier logic. The codebase is fully synthetic and includes exactly 12 unit tests, contradicting the metadata claim of 18 expected passing tests.
